design_philosophy.emotion: Deep empathy, trust, relief, and professional care.
design_philosophy.copywriting_tone: Targeting the 'reptilian brain' - addressing the fear of a sick pet and offering the ultimate relief and transformation. All text MUST be in fluent, natural Bengali.
design_philosophy.visual_mood: Warm, clean, trustworthy, using soft medical blues and crisp whites to feel sterile yet welcoming.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-extrabold tracking-tight leading-tight

components_strategy.header: Sticky with Glassmorphism (Crystal Glass). Must contain the logo, nav links (হোম, সেবাসমূহ, ব্লগ, যোগাযোগ), and CTA button.
components_strategy.hero: Split layout or subtle overlap. High-emotional Bengali text on left, highly empathetic image on right. Maximum overlay opacity bg-black/30 if using background image.
components_strategy.buttons: Primary buttons use sky-600, rounded-full, with hover lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
components_strategy.cards: Neumorphic tactile or clean flat with 1px border. bg-white, border-slate-100, shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]. Must have generous internal padding (p-8).
components_strategy.dashboard: Strict grid hierarchy. Use flat surfaces with subtle 1px borders (border-slate-200), no excessive shadows. Sidebar navigation.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Cards lift slightly (hover:-translate-y-1) and increase shadow. Buttons scale slightly (hover:scale-105) with transition-transform duration-300.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered fade-ins and slide-ups (initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}).
motion_and_interactions.glass_panels: Add backdrop-saturate-150 to glassmorphism headers to make colors pop.

logo.description: Supreme Pet Clinic Logo (Blue heart with cat and dog silhouette)

hero_image.description: White dog and gray cat hugging affectionately on grass - highly emotional.

services_vet.description: Veterinarian carefully holding and examining a dog - shows professional care.

blog_placeholder.description: Shallow focus of a happy dog and cat.

copywriting_bengali.hero_title: আপনার আদরের পোষা প্রাণীটি কি অসুস্থ? আমরা আছি তো!
copywriting_bengali.hero_subtitle: সাভারের বুকে একমাত্র আধুনিক ও বিশ্বস্ত পেট ক্লিনিক, যেখানে আপনার আদরের বন্ধুটি পাবে পরিবারের মতোই মমতা ও সেরা চিকিৎসা।

testing.data_testid_rule: All interactive elements MUST include a descriptive data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='hero-book-appointment-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Add the Google Fonts import for 'Baloo Da 2' and 'Hind Siliguri' in index.css.
Build the website as a React single-page application (or multi-page routing with react-router-dom) encompassing Marketing Pages (Home, Services, Blog, Contact) and a separate Admin Dashboard route.
Ensure all copy is entirely in natural Bengali as per the guidelines.
Implement the Contact section with static information (Savar, Dhaka / +880 1797-993951, +880 1738-139977) and a functional form.
Admin panel must include 'Manage Appointments', 'Add Blog Post', and 'View Messages' sections using a dense layout.
